steps: The following document the correct procedure for tissue acquisition in the University of Minnesota Medical Center, Fairview/ East Bank Gross Room. BioNet Tissue Processing SOP.docx
The purpose of this document is to describe BioNet’s current tissue processing procedure for Formalin Fixed Paraffin Embedded (FFPE) blocks. BioNet Tissue Processing SOP.docx
